inspectionNotes.humanEvidenceRule: Do not mark production blockers closed unless current accepted evidence is genuinely certifying. Do not fabricate human-observed evidence.

commitSequence.title: Restore evidence acceptance
commitSequence.commitGoal: Accept current sanitized human-observed restore and retention recoverability proof without production mutation.

commitSequence.title: Production ingest runtime
commitSequence.commitGoal: Accept bounded production queue-depth/operator proof and keep dry-run/staging evidence non-certifying.

commitSequence.title: Raw report storage remediation
commitSequence.commitGoal: Collect reliable sanitized inventory and accepted raw-report remediation evidence.

commitSequence.title: Observability and response ops
commitSequence.commitGoal: Accept live alert proof or formal alerting exclusion and preserve response operations readiness semantics.

commitSequence.title: Migration governance
commitSequence.commitGoal: Convert temporary runtime ensure allowlist residuals or add accepted non-mutating policy closure so migration gate can certify.

commitSequence.title: Harness and local command reliability
commitSequence.commitGoal: Make certification/check/test command entry points reliable without weakening gates.

commitSequence.title: Environment/operator diagnostics
commitSequence.commitGoal: Capture authorized read-only staging observability and service diagnostics.

commitSequence.title: Sensitive endpoint proof
commitSequence.commitGoal: Replace design-only sensitive-list evidence with endpoint-level privacy tests and bounded hidden-risk contracts.

commitSequence.title: Remaining P2/P3 hardening
commitSequence.commitGoal: Clean up lower-priority production-scale hardening without broad rewrites.

commitSequence.title: Final certification
commitSequence.commitGoal: Regenerate production-scale evidence and promotion pack only after all upstream P1 blockers are genuinely closed.

blockers.title: Production promotion pack is non-certifying
blockers.auditEvidence: production-scale:promotion-pack returned CERTIFYING:false, limited beta, canPromoteProductionAtScale:false, and six unresolved production blockers.
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: pnpm run promote:production before latest-production-promotion-pack.json is genuinely CERTIFYING:true
manual edits that flip CERTIFYING/readiness/blocker classifications
deleting non-certifying evidence instead of replacing it with stronger current evidence
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: docs/production-scale/evidence/latest-production-promotion-pack.json with CERTIFYING:true, canPromoteProductionAtScale:true, no unresolved production blockers, current target SHA, and accepted P1 evidence references
testsToAddOrUpdate: Promotion pack fails if any six P1 closure artifacts are missing, stale, simulated-only, partial, or not current-head evidence.
Promotion pack validates the Level 10 audit closure set.
blockers.impactBoundary: Final aggregation only after upstream blockers are closed; do not change readiness semantics directly.
regressionRisks: Stale or manually edited evidence could be mistaken for certification.
doneCriteria: Promotion pack is machine-certifying true only after all upstream required evidence is accepted.

blockers.title: Disaster recovery proof is simulated-only
blockers.auditEvidence: restore:evidence:current-check status simulated-only and currentOperationalProof false; promotion pack blocker 1 Critical/requires-human-proof.
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: running production dump/restore from Codex
treating pnpm run restore:drill:simulated as production proof
including backup contents, raw restored data, credentials, URLs, or PII in evidence
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: docs/production-scale/evidence/latest-human-restore-drill-evidence-acceptance.json accepted true
docs/production-scale/evidence/latest-restore-readiness-check.json status current-human-observed, currentOperationalProof true, evidenceType HUMAN-OBSERVED, simulatedOnly false, stale false
testsToAddOrUpdate: Reject simulated, stale, missing RPO/RTO, missing post-restore checks, placeholders, secrets, PII, raw report data, and signed URLs.
Promotion pack refuses stale accepted restore evidence.
blockers.impactBoundary: Evidence validation only; no production data restore or mutation from Codex.
regressionRisks: Human proof could be incomplete, stale, or accidentally include sensitive details.
doneCriteria: Current sanitized human-observed restore proof is accepted and current-check is certifying.

blockers.title: Production ingest runtime proof is not accepted
blockers.auditEvidence: production-worker:readiness-evidence status prepared-awaiting-human-production-evidence and productionProof false; blocker 2 Critical/partial.
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: running pnpm run ingest:worker --apply against production from Codex
using staging queue drain evidence as production runtime proof
bypassing workflow inputs, operator acknowledgement, max-job limits, failure stop behavior, or rollback stop verification
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: docs/production-scale/evidence/production-worker-queue-depth-evidence.json with sanitized accepted apply-mode operator proof
docs/production-scale/evidence/latest-production-worker-readiness.json with productionProof true and productionIngestRuntime coverage true
testsToAddOrUpdate: Accepted queue-depth evidence is required for blocker 2.
Dry-run, staging-only, failure, missing acknowledgement, or missing rollback proof remains non-certifying.
blockers.impactBoundary: Production worker evidence acceptance; no direct production queue processing from Codex.
regressionRisks: Operator evidence could close the wrong environment or hide failures/dead letters.
doneCriteria: Readiness evidence accepts bounded production runtime proof and promotion pack closes blocker 2.

blockers.title: Historical raw report byte remediation remains unresolved
blockers.auditEvidence: storage remediation status inventory-unreliable; blocker 6 High/partial; acceptance not closed.
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: direct production DB deletes/updates from Codex
mutation flags such as --apply, --execute, --mutate, or custom SQL remediation from this session
printing storageUrl values, raw base64, raw PDFs, signed URLs, database URLs, or consumer identifiers
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: latest-storage-raw-report-inventory.json with reachable DB and reliable aggregate counts
latest-storage-raw-report-remediation-plan.json based on reliable inventory
latest-storage-raw-report-remediation-acceptance.json accepted true and historicalRawReportBytes true
testsToAddOrUpdate: Inventory unavailable must not imply zero inline rows.
Acceptance rejects simulated proof, missing operator approval, unreliable inventory, raw sensitive values, secrets, and PII.
blockers.impactBoundary: Sanitized inventory/remediation evidence; no destructive cleanup from Codex.
regressionRisks: Unreliable inventory could be mistaken for zero inline raw report rows.
doneCriteria: Reliable aggregate inventory and accepted sanitized operator remediation evidence close blocker 6.

blockers.title: Observability and alerting proof is not accepted
blockers.auditEvidence: alerting exclusion status not-submitted; response ops live scheduler disabled and alerting dry-run-only; blocker 9 High/simulated-proof-only.
safeCommands: pnpm run check:staging-observability from an authorized read-only staging environment
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/response-ops-readiness-evidence.spec.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts tests/unit/staging-observability-check.spec.ts
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: sending live external alerts from Codex without explicit approved operator action
treating dry-run alerts as live proof
printing webhook URLs, Slack/email provider secrets, SSH keys, raw logs with PII, or tokens
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: docs/production-scale/evidence/live-alert-proof.json accepted by response ops readiness, or latest-alerting-exclusion-validation.json accepted true
latest-response-ops-readiness.json with alerting.status live-evidenced or formally-excluded and observabilityAlerting true
testsToAddOrUpdate: Formal exclusion requires scope, reason, risk acceptance, review/expiry, monitoring path, dry-run-not-live acknowledgement, and signed operator acknowledgement.
Promotion pack does not close blocker 9 with dry-run-only evidence.
blockers.impactBoundary: Alerting/observability proof only; no live provider setup from Codex.
regressionRisks: Dry-run alert evidence could be misrepresented as live delivery.
doneCriteria: Response ops readiness accepts either live alert proof or a formal exclusion and promotion pack closes blocker 9.

blockers.title: Migration governance still depends on a temporary allowlist
blockers.auditEvidence: migrations:gate status accepted-temporary-allowlist and CERTIFYING:false; promotion pack blocker 10 High/partial.
safeCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-gate.spec.ts tests/unit/migration-checker.spec.ts
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: running production DDL from Codex
removing temporary allowlist entries before reviewed additive migrations or accepted policy closure exists
changing CERTIFYING to true while temporary allowlist residuals remain active
adding unreviewed schema ensures or ad hoc migrations
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: docs/production-scale/evidence/latest-migration-gate.json with status accepted-release-blocking, CERTIFYING true, temporaryAllowlistActive false, releaseBlockingFindings 0, migrationGovernance true, and non-mutating safety fields
testsToAddOrUpdate: Converted runtime ensure paths are ledgered and migration-backed.
Gate fails for unknown, unledgered, invalid allowlist, expired allowlist, schema mutation, production mutation, or DDL execution signals.
blockers.impactBoundary: Migration governance conversion only; schema behavior changes require explicit later approval.
regressionRisks: Prematurely removing allowlist entries can break runtime compatibility or hide schema drift.
doneCriteria: Migration gate is release-blocking, non-mutating, certifying true, and has no active temporary allowlist residuals.

blockers.title: Production certification harness is not self-contained
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: embedding staging credentials or secrets in the repo
downgrading auth smoke gates to optional pass
treating missing environment as app auth failure
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: latest-production-scale-certification.json with auth smokes passed under supplied staging-safe env or explicit actionable missing-env diagnostics
testsToAddOrUpdate: Harness env handling is self-contained through documented non-secret input plumbing.
Required gates remain required.

blockers.title: Default pnpm run check times out rollback governance tests locally
safeCommands: pnpm run check after bounded timeout/optimization fix
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: deleting rollback SHA governance assertions
skipping shell block validation without equivalent static proof
widening deploy permissions or weakening rollback validation
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: pnpm run check completes locally and rollback governance evidence remains passed
testsToAddOrUpdate: Suite-specific timeout or optimized static workflow/bash validation with assertions intact.

blockers.title: Lint and plain test commands are unavailable
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: mapping aliases to no-op commands
replacing canonical test commands with weaker aliases
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: package.json exposes real lint/test aliases tied to existing or deliberately added checks
testsToAddOrUpdate: Package script tests assert aliases point at real commands.

blockers.title: Staging observability SSH check cannot run from this environment
safeCommands: pnpm run check:staging-observability with CRP_STAGING_OBSERVABILITY_CHECK=true from authorized read-only staging access
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: using production host targets
changing server config, Traefik, Docker, Postgres, secrets, or production containers
printing raw logs that may contain PII or credentials
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: latest-staging-observability.json or sanitized operator artifact with read-only source, accepted HTTP/log checks, raw logs excluded, secrets redacted, and production hosts refused
testsToAddOrUpdate: If evidence writing is added, preserve current read-only and redaction guarantees.

blockers.title: Local Docker daemon unavailable for staging service diagnostics
safeCommands: pnpm run check:staging-services from an environment with Docker access to staging service
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: docker compose up/down/rm/restart or container mutation from this bounded task
editing staging/proxy/Postgres/production config
exposing environment variables or service credentials
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: Sanitized service diagnostics showing expected staging containers, health, recent log tail classification, no raw secrets, and no mutation
testsToAddOrUpdate: If converted to a script, add Docker-unavailable reporting and secret/log redaction tests.

blockers.title: Runtime size warnings remain accepted by waiver
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: enabling a hard runtime-size gate without accepted performance evidence and release owner approval
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: Accepted hard-gate runtime size policy evidence or explicit warning-only waiver retained as non-certifying pressure
testsToAddOrUpdate: Runtime-size policy distinguishes hard gate, warning-only waiver, and failed thresholds.

blockers.title: Response operations are operator-ready with deferred live controls
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: enabling live scheduler from Codex
running apply/backfill/purge/archive without approved operator window and dry-run evidence
treating dashboard PASS while SKIP/HUMAN_REQUIRED rows remain as release proof
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: latest-response-ops-readiness.json with response operations maturity accepted and deferred live controls either proven or explicitly excluded/limited
testsToAddOrUpdate: Preserve SKIP/SIMULATED/HUMAN_REQUIRED semantics.
Require exact commands and disallow dashboard pass alone as release evidence.

blockers.title: Production-safe probes are plan-only
safeCommands: pnpm run production-safe-probes:evidence in current plan-only form
future approved read-only production probes only if policy permits
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: running live production probes from Codex unless an existing command is explicitly read-only/dry-run and authorized
using unauthenticated or ownership-bypassing probes as certification
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: Accepted production-safe probe evidence with read-only scope, auth/owner denial proof, current target SHA, and no mutation
testsToAddOrUpdate: Read-only probe policy and production host refusal/allow rules.

blockers.title: Sensitive list endpoint proof is partial/design-only
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: adding blind row limits that change aggregate semantics
returning raw extracted text, signature data, storage URLs, signed URLs, or raw snippets from list endpoints
weakening owner/admin boundaries
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: latest-sensitive-list-endpoints.json no longer partial-design-only for hidden-risk semantics, plus endpoint-level privacy tests proving metadata-only lists and bounded aggregate/page contracts
testsToAddOrUpdate: Parser-test and consumer-signature list privacy contracts.
Hidden-risk aggregate totals remain full-set while rows are bounded and paginated.

blockers.title: Generated evidence files trigger CRLF warnings
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: rewriting unrelated evidence content while normalizing line endings
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: No whitespace or CRLF warnings from generated evidence replacements
testsToAddOrUpdate: No new tests required unless generator normalization is changed.

blockers.title: Admin packet page intentionally mentions render/cache internals
safeCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/packet-viewer.spec.tsx
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: changing packet truth, evidence binding, or consumer-facing legal conclusions
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: Normal-user page assertion proves admin diagnostics are not rendered for consumers
testsToAddOrUpdate: Full page normal-user assertion for diagnostic banner absence.

blockers.title: Safety-flag refusal messages are correct but add command friction
unsafeCommandsToAvoid: removing explicit safety flags from production-scale harness commands
expectedCertifyingEvidenceArtifact: Documented exact safe command variants while refusal behavior remains intact
testsToAddOrUpdate: Existing harness refusal tests should remain unchanged.

auditJsonValidationSearchNote: Repository search did not find an existing Level 10 audit JSON validation test. Use JSON parse validation for this plan and the source audit JSON unless a future test is added.
